rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY MA ET AL VS. PATRICK FOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THE CROSS-CLAIMS OF CROSS COMPLAINANT NORTH POINT OCEAN PARTNERS, LLC SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2024 line 1. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THE CROSS-CLAIMS OF CROSS COMPLAINANT NORTH POINT OCEAN PARTNERS, LLC SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file for Cross-Complainant North Point Ocean Partners, LLC on its counsel of record Sally Williams. On March 9, 2020 Blair Will substituted in as counsel of record for North Point Ocean Partners, LLC in its capacity as a defendant in this action. Blair Will has later been relieved as counsel. Since Blair Will has never substituted in is counsel for Cross-Complainant, Ms. Williams remains counsel of record for Cross-Complaint North Point Ocean Partners, LLC and must be served. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LSC 906-908 BROADWAY LLC VS. STARTUP TEMPLE HOLDINGS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment To Set The Deficiency Judgment Against Guarantor Pavel Cherkashin, Only; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Eugene Rozovsky In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2024 line 2. PLAINTIFF LSC 906-908 BROADWAY LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO SET THE DEFICIENCY JUDGMENT AGAINST GUARANTOR PAVEL CHERKASHIN, ONLY; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND DECLARATION OF EUGENE ROZOVSKY IN SUPPORT THEREOF is OFF CALENDAR. On December 11, 2023 the Court, per request of the moving party, changed its tentative ruling to take the motion off calendar due to receipt of incomplete and untabbed courtesy copies, continued the matter for the moving party to deliver a complete set of courtesy copies with tabs. A new set of courtesy copies was received with no tabs. The Court is now in possession of (1) an incomplete untabbed set of courtesy copies ending at exhibit 2 of 7 and (2) another untabbed set ending with a page bearing signature of "Beverly Brunner." CRC 3.1110; Court's December 11, 2023 minute order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ANDREW KING VS. VAL-CHRIS INVESTMENTS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANT GLENN AND CARRIE DONAHUE, TRUSTEES OF THE GLENN, JOHN LACY DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the causes of action to wrongful eviction, intentional infliction of emotional distress and trespass is sustained with 10-day leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action as to the Plaintiff. Demurrer is otherwise overruled as the causes of action subject to the demurrer are sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ANDREW KING VS. VAL-CHRIS INVESTMENTS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANT GLENN AND CARRIE DONAHUE, TRUSTEES OF THE GLENN, JOHN LACY MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the paragraph 109 which refers to the "judgment as set forth below" presumably "below" is the prayer, which seeks damages that are not available under UCL. Motion DENIED as to the request for punitive damages as fraud is sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
